title: Leave & Attendance Policy
description: Comprehensive guide covering all types of leaves, attendance expectations, and time-off procedures.

sections.heading: Annual Leave
sections.body: Every employee is entitled to 18 days of paid annual leave per year. Leave must be applied at least 3 days in advance. Unused leave can be carried forward up to 10 days to the next year.

sections.heading: Sick Leave
sections.body: Employees are entitled to 12 days of paid sick leave per year. Medical certificate required for absences exceeding 3 consecutive days. Sick leave cannot be carried forward.

sections.heading: Work From Home
sections.body: Employees may work from home up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Core hours of 10 AM - 4 PM IST must be maintained. WFH requests should be submitted 24 hours in advance.

sections.heading: Public Holidays
sections.body: The company observes 12 public holidays per year as declared by the government. A holiday list will be shared at the beginning of each year.

title: Code of Conduct
description: Our workplace values, ethical standards, and professional behavior expectations for all employees.

sections.heading: Core Values
sections.body: We are committed to integrity, respect, and excellence in all we do. Every employee is expected to treat colleagues, clients, and partners with dignity and professionalism.

sections.heading: Conflict of Interest
sections.body: Employees must disclose any potential conflicts of interest to their manager and HR. This includes outside employment, personal relationships with vendors, or financial interests in competing companies.

sections.heading: Zero Tolerance
sections.body: The company has zero tolerance for harassment, discrimination, bullying, or any form of misconduct. Violations are subject to immediate disciplinary action including termination.

title: Performance Review Process
description: Understand the bi-annual performance review cycle, goal setting framework, and career growth paths.

sections.heading: Review Cycle
sections.body: Performance reviews are conducted bi-annually in June and December. Mid-year reviews focus on progress and course correction. Year-end reviews determine ratings and compensation adjustments.

sections.heading: Rating Scale
sections.body: Employees are rated on a 5-point scale: Exceeds Expectations (5), Meets All Expectations (4), Meets Most Expectations (3), Needs Improvement (2), Unsatisfactory (1).

sections.heading: Goal Setting
sections.body: Goals are set using the OKR (Objectives and Key Results) framework at the beginning of each half. Goals must be SMART and aligned with team and company objectives.

title: IT Security & Data Protection
description: Guidelines on data security, acceptable use of company systems, BYOD policy, and data privacy regulations.

sections.heading: Password Policy
sections.body: Passwords must be at least 12 characters with a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. Passwords must be changed every 90 days. Two-factor authentication is mandatory for all systems.

sections.heading: Data Classification
sections.body: Company data is classified as Public, Internal, Confidential, or Restricted. Employees must handle data according to its classification and never share confidential data via unauthorized channels.

title: Travel & Expense Policy
description: Business travel guidelines, expense reimbursement process, per diem rates, and approval workflows.

sections.heading: Travel Approval
sections.body: All business travel must be pre-approved by the department head. Travel requests must be submitted at least 5 business days in advance for domestic and 10 days for international travel.

sections.heading: Per Diem Rates
sections.body: Domestic: ₹2,500/day for metro cities, ₹1,800/day for other cities. International: As per the approved country-specific rates. Meals exceeding the per diem require additional approval.

title: Learning & Development Policy
description: Training allowances, certification reimbursements, mentorship programs, and continuous learning initiatives.

sections.heading: Training Budget
sections.body: Each employee receives an annual L&D budget of ₹50,000 for courses, certifications, conferences, and books. Unused budget does not carry forward. Requests must be submitted 2 weeks in advance.

sections.heading: Certification Support
sections.body: The company reimburses 100% of certification costs for role-relevant certifications. For general certifications, 75% reimbursement is provided upon passing. Employees must commit to 1 year of service post-reimbursement.

title: Employee Benefits & Perks
description: Health insurance, wellness programs, meal benefits, gym allowances, and other employee perks.

sections.heading: Health Insurance
sections.body: All employees receive comprehensive health insurance coverage of ₹5,00,000 per annum covering self, spouse, and up to 2 children. Parents can be added at a subsidized premium of 20%.

sections.heading: Wellness Benefits
sections.body: Monthly wellness allowance of ₹2,000 for gym, yoga, meditation apps, or fitness equipment. Annual health check-up is fully covered and mandatory for all employees.

title: Anti-Harassment Policy
description: POSH guidelines, reporting mechanisms, investigation process, and our commitment to a safe workplace.

sections.heading: What Constitutes Harassment
sections.body: Any unwelcome conduct based on gender, race, religion, caste, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic that creates a hostile work environment.

sections.heading: Reporting
sections.body: Report harassment to HR, the Internal Committee, or via our anonymous reporting portal. All complaints are treated with strict confidentiality. Retaliation against complainants is strictly prohibited.
